title: Add SQS DLQ recovery runbook and CLI tools
summary: Basic DLQ documentation exists in RUNBOOK.md but needs step-by-step troubleshooting procedures and CLI tools for common failure scenarios.
acceptance: Enhanced RUNBOOK.md with detailed DLQ recovery procedures
CLI tool for DLQ message inspection
CLI tool for message redrive automation
Common failure scenarios documented with solutions
Runbook includes correlation ID tracking across queues
impact: High - operational readiness for production incidents
notes: Critical for ops team confidence and incident response time.
